about.name: Rujul Dwivedi
about.title: Software Developer · AI & Backend Architecture
about.pitch: An inherently chaotic universe constantly produces terabytes of unpredictable, deeply nested anomalies. I am secretly trying to impose a quiet, unified order on it before the entropy wins. If I do my job flawlessly, the system holds, the timeline is saved, and absolutely nobody knows I was here.

experiencePresent.title: Software Developer
description: Architected a resilient Backend-for-Frontend proxy orchestrating complex GraphQL mutations across distributed Adobe Journey Optimizer microservices—decoupling the React frontend from API volatility and enforcing strict environment boundaries.
Engineered a deterministic, state-aware data migration engine for deeply nested marketing schemas—preventing duplication and cascading failures during entity duplication.
Built a concurrent React orchestration layer resolving fractured asynchronous API responses into a unified dependency tree without blocking the main thread.
Enforced zero-trust dual authentication and GitOps deployment via Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, and Argo CD for immutable releases.

experiencePast.title: Analyst Intern
description: Engineered a Databricks preprocessing pipeline with SMOTE to rebalance a 99.7% skewed dataset of 2M rows.
Benchmarked LSTM vs BERT, optimizing for minority-class recall from 79% to over 90%.
Delivered a classification model at 97.5% accuracy for production pipeline integration.

experiencePast.title: Research Assistant
description: Modeled a pricing engine with Physics-Informed Neural Networks and LSTMs on Black–Scholes PDEs—~10% error reduction vs classical baselines.
Benchmarked architectures on spatio-temporal financial data; implemented stochastic volatility in PyTorch with multi-year options backtesting.
